title: React Compiler Analyzer — risk-detection config
description: Configuration for the `analyze --risk-config <file>` non-reactive store-read detection. See the package README ('Compiled but Risky') for rule semantics.

$schema.description: Optional reference to this JSON schema for editor IntelliSense.

storeAccessorPattern.description: Regex source matching store-accessor function names (e.g. `Store$` for `getAppStore`). When set, enables `getXStore().field` non-reactive snapshot detection (`nonreactive-store-read`, `medium`). Omit to disable.

detectGetStateReads.description: Enable detection of imperative `.getState()` snapshot reads (`nonreactive-store-read`, `high`). Default: false.
